name: test_should_datetime_into_date_time[datetime({year: 1984, month: 10, day: 11, hour: 12, timezone: 'Europe/Stockholm'})-{datetime: other, timezone: '+05:00'}-'1984-10-11T16:00+05:00']

parameters.name: _pytest_bdd_example
parameters.value: {'other': "datetime({year: 1984, month: 10, day: 11, hour: 12, timezone: 'Europe/Stockholm'})", 'expression': "{datetime: other, timezone: '+05:00'}", 'result': "'1984-10-11T16:00+05:00'"}
